prd.user_story: As a compliance engineer preparing a SOC 2 audit evidence bundle, I need to trace Grafana's auditLoggingAppPlatform feature flag from its definition through audit infrastructure, API server wiring, and DI registration to prove the audit logging control is implemented end-to-end.
constraints: Identify the feature flag definition in the feature management registry.
Trace the audit infrastructure layer: Logger interface, Event model, Policy evaluation, Noop implementation.
Trace the API server wiring: APIGroupAuditor interface, policy aggregation, service DI.
Write findings to /workspace/answer.json with comprehensive text explaining how the layers connect.
prd.success_definition: Agent identifies the 10 architecturally significant files spanning feature flag definition (registry.go, toggles_gen.go), audit infrastructure (logger.go, event.go, policy.go, noop.go), API server wiring (common.go, helper.go, service.go), and DI registration (wireset.go).
prd.seed_prompt: Trace the auditLoggingAppPlatform feature flag in grafana/grafana from its definition through the audit backend infrastructure to the API server wiring. Produce a compliance evidence bundle.

deepsearch_variant.variant_prompt: Use Deep Search to synthesize the end-to-end audit logging control across feature management, audit infrastructure, and API server wiring in grafana/grafana.
